content.full_text:
February 9, 2001

Van Wilkinson, Consultant
State of California
Department of Education
Education Technology Office
Post Office Box 944272
Sacramento, CA 94244-2720

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-01-009

Dear Mr. Wilkinson:

We have received your letter notifying us that you have withdrawn your request for advice, dated January 11, 2001.

Please do not hesitate to contact our office if you have any other questions regarding this matter or decide that you require formal advice1 relating to the Political Reform Act.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

NB:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\01-009

1 Formal written advice confers immunity on the person requesting the advice under Section 83114(b) and Regulation 18329(b)(7), enclosed. Informal assistance, which includes phone advice and guidance from advice letters written to others, does not provide such immunity. (Regulation 18329(c)(3).)
